name: SelectionBehavior
summary: Determines which ModelItem is selected when using the Select tool to pick an object

enum_values.name: Model
enum_values.summary: First item containing object picked that HasModel (File)

enum_values.name: Layer
enum_values.summary: First item containing object picked that IsLayer

enum_values.name: FirstObject
enum_values.summary: First item containing object picked that is child of IsLayer item

enum_values.name: LastUnique
enum_values.summary: Last item containing object picked that has Instances count of 1

enum_values.name: Geometry
enum_values.summary: Last item containing object picked that HasGeometry

enum_values.name: UniqueGeometryParent
enum_values.summary: First item that only contains object picked

enum_values.name: NoSelectionChange
enum_values.summary: Picking has no effect (selection does not change)

enum_values.name: LastComposite
enum_values.summary: Last item containing object picked that IsComposite

enum_values.name: Custom
enum_values.summary: Custom selection behaviour, defined by the application
